mapper.insert: insert into customer_service_message(session_id, sender_type, sender_id, message_type, content, flagged, create_time) values(#{sessionId}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{flagged}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select m.id, m.session_id as sessionId, m.sender_type as senderType, m.sender_id as senderId, case when m.sender_type = 'user' then u.name when m.sender_type = 'admin' then e.name else m.sender_type end as senderName, m.message_type as messageType, m.content, m.flagged, m.create_time as createTime from customer_service_message m left join user u on m.sender_type = 'user' and u.id = m.sender_id left join employee e on m.sender_type = 'admin' and e.id = m.sender_id where m.session_id = #{sessionId} and m.id > #{lastMessageId} order by m.id asc
